---
title: "Article with live figures"
---

Reference `.excalidraw` files like any other figure. The source stays under
version control; rendering happens during `quarto render`.

As @fig-arch shows, no exported SVG or PNG files are maintained by hand.

![Overall architecture](figures/arch.excalidraw){#fig-arch width=70%}

Options go on the image attributes — @fig-flow keeps its scene background:

![The flow](figures/flow.excalidraw){#fig-flow background=scene}

Charts are live figures too — @fig-chart is a Vega-Lite spec:

![Category totals](figures/chart.vl.json){#fig-chart}
